Off Calendar Apr-19-2023 Granted Per Written Order

Off Calendar Apr-05-2023 Continued To Apr-19-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Mar-08-2023 Continued To Apr-05-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Joseph Patane, via Zoom, in propria persona, Personal Representative.

Mr. Patane acknowledges the tentative ruling in this matter and the court mentions the several issues with this matter as advised to him via the Examiner's notes. Mr. Patane reports as to the delay, specifically mentioning finding gas leases which he is working on confirming their validity. Mr. Patane advises that he intends to clear the Examiner's notes within the next week.

After additional discussion, the matter is continued to Apr-05-2023 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 204. Mr. Patane is instructed to clear all Examiner's notes by Mar-15-2023.

Judge: Hon. Stephen M. Murphy. Examiner: Aeyoung Kim. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Choi. Not Reported.

Off Calendar Apr-26-2022 Continued To May-31-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Dec-28-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Joseph Patane appeared by zoom in propria persona.

The court stated that it is aware Mr. Patane is an attorney, but not in the area of probate and questions whether he is sufficiently familiar with the handling of an estate. Mr. Patane stated that he believes he is, that the only asset in the estate is a bank account that was over the minimum amount and that everything else was left in a trust. The court informed Mr. Patane that an inventory and appraisal needs to be filed and reminds him that no money is to be distributed out of the estate until there is an order for final distribution. There being no objections, the court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The will dated February 17, 1994 is admitted to probate. Joseph M. Patane is appointed as the Executor of the estate with full authority. Bond is not required. Status on close of estate is set for February 14, 2023 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. If a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report on status of administration is filed at least two weeks prior, the status hearing will be taken off calendar. Status on filing of the inventory and appraisal is set for April 26, 2022. Shirley Yawitz is appointed probate referee.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.
